series_metadata.series_description: Journals containing all entries and orders signed by the Commissioners and Attorney Examiners. Series includes Formal Journals, Motor Carrier Permit Journals, Motor Carrier Certificate Journals, and Rate Journals.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: transferred microfilm and microfilm has been checked quality and completeness ; Electronic: system is determined obsolete ; Microform: permanently. Copy sent State Archives
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Other ; Microform: Permanent
